label: LogFire
info: LogFire — debug logging hub for WiFi microcontrollers

name: Parse & Store

Build: run 'python build.py' to embed UI HTML
info:
The fn_serve_ui node contains a placeholder.
Run 'python build.py' from the nodered/ folder to inject index.html into the flow.
Logs persist to /data/logfire_logs.json and survive restarts.
